testcase.name: Admin API Tests › Admin dashboard should require admin authentication

failure.message: admin.spec.ts:44:3 Admin audit log stats should return metrics

testcase.name: Analytics API Tests › Analytics metrics should handle date range queries
Applications API Tests › Applications endpoint should require authentication
Applications API Tests › Applications endpoint should validate pagination parameters
Applications API Tests › Application creation should validate required fields
Applications API Tests › Application by ID should handle non-existent IDs
Applications API Tests › Application documents upload should validate file types
Applications API Tests › Application slip generation should validate application exists
Authentication API Tests › Login endpoint should handle invalid credentials
Authentication API Tests › Register endpoint should validate required fields
Authentication API Tests › Password reset should validate email format
Authentication API Tests › Password reset with valid email should return success
Catalog API Tests › Programs endpoint should return valid data structure
Catalog API Tests › Intakes endpoint should return current intakes
Catalog API Tests › Subjects endpoint should return subjects list
Catalog API Tests › Programs endpoint should handle query parameters
Catalog API Tests › Intakes endpoint should handle filtering
Health API Tests › Health endpoint should return 200
Health API Tests › Health endpoint should include timestamp
Notifications API Tests › Send notification should validate recipient
Notifications API Tests › Application submitted notification should validate application ID
Notifications API Tests › Dispatch channel should validate channel type
Notifications API Tests › Process email queue should require admin access
Notifications API Tests › Notification preferences should validate user ID
Notifications API Tests › Update consent should validate consent data
